text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to make some snacks for Super Creek to
have during her training breaks, I decide to go
out and shop for various ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious, look at all of the stuff you
have... Are you planning a party or something?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I would have cooked for you if you had just told
me. Please remember that you can ask me for
anything, okay?
choice_data_list:
I thought you might want something to munch
on during your training breaks.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry? You're saying that's for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nutrient intake during training is necessary to
improve strength and stamina. And I figured a
tasty treat wouldn't hurt either.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're planning to make the snacks yourself
instead of just buying nutrition bars?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm only who I am today because you're always
working so hard for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You study so hard, are super considerate, and
give me tons of energy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Which means I must find some way to repay you!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
A gift of gratitude full of love to soothe your
body and soul... Hehe! ♪
